subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Who was the first Chieftain of Mewar?
question_hi: मैरे के पहले श्रमिक कौन थे?
explanation_en: Rao Khem Chand was the first Chieftain of Mewar. He was also known as Rao Rawal Khem Chand and ruled from 1433 to 1468.

question_en: Who was the first Chieftain of Mewar?
explanation_en: Jayapala I was succeeded by Chittor and later Udaipur became the capital of Mewar.
